title: AN ACT AMENDING AND REPEALING CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED AND TWENTY, REGARDING PUBLIC WORKS PROJECTS FOR THE PROVINCE OF BOHOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1907 / 50 OG No. 8, 4067 (September, 1954)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1156, June 17, 1954 ]

AN ACT AMENDING AND REPEALING CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED AND TWENTY, REGARDING PUBLIC WORKS PROJECTS FOR THE PROVINCE OF BOHOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The following new item is inserted after item (

b

), (8) Province of Bohol, paragraph (

e

), Title B, section one, Republic Act Numbered Nine hundred twenty, as follows:

b-1

) For the construction of Clarin Municipal Town Hall芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄P35,000.00"
